mapper.sql: b.id, b.title, b.subtitle, b.image_media_id, ma.url as image_url, b.jump_type, b.jump_target, b.sort_no, b.status, b.click_count, b.start_at, b.end_at, b.created_at
mapper.select: select from cook_banners b left join cook_media_assets ma on ma.id = b.image_media_id and ma.deleted_at is null where b.deleted_at is null and b.status = 'online' and (b.start_at is null or b.start_at <= #{now}) and (b.end_at is null or b.end_at >= #{now}) order by b.sort_no asc, b.id desc

select from cook_banners b left join cook_media_assets ma on ma.id = b.image_media_id and ma.deleted_at is null where b.deleted_at is null
and b.status = #{status}
and (b.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or b.subtitle like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by b.sort_no asc, b.id desc

select id, title, subtitle, image_media_id, jump_type, jump_target, sort_no, status, start_at, end_at, exposure_count, click_count, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from cook_banners where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into cook_banners (title, subtitle, image_media_id, jump_type, jump_target, sort_no, status, start_at, end_at) values (#{title}, #{subtitle}, #{imageMediaId}, #{jumpType}, #{jumpTarget}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, #{startAt}, #{endAt})
mapper.update: update cook_banners set title = #{title}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, image_media_id = #{imageMediaId}, jump_type = #{jumpType}, jump_target = #{jumpTarget}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_banners set deleted_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_banners set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_banners set sort_no = #{sortNo}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_banners set click_count = click_count + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
mapper.select: select f.id, f.user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, f.type, f.content, f.media_ids_json, f.contact, f.status, f.reply_content, f.replied_at, f.created_at from cook_feedbacks f inner join cook_users u on u.id = f.user_id and u.deleted_at is null where f.user_id = #{userId} and f.deleted_at is null order by f.created_at desc, f.id desc

select f.id, f.user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, f.type, f.content, f.media_ids_json, f.contact, f.status, f.reply_content, f.replied_at, f.created_at from cook_feedbacks f inner join cook_users u on u.id = f.user_id and u.deleted_at is null where f.id = #{id} and f.user_id = #{userId} and f.deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into cook_feedbacks (user_id, type, content, media_ids_json, contact, status, reply_content, replied_at) values (#{userId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{mediaIdsJson}, #{contact}, #{status}, #{replyContent}, #{repliedAt})
mapper.select:
select f.id, f.user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, f.type, f.content, f.media_ids_json, f.contact, f.status, f.reply_content, f.replied_at, f.created_at from cook_feedbacks f inner join cook_users u on u.id = f.user_id and u.deleted_at is null where f.deleted_at is null
and f.status = #{status}
and (u.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or f.content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by f.created_at desc, f.id desc

select f.id, f.user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, f.type, f.content, f.media_ids_json, f.contact, f.status, f.reply_content, f.replied_at, f.created_at from cook_feedbacks f inner join cook_users u on u.id = f.user_id and u.deleted_at is null where f.id = #{id} and f.deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.update: update cook_feedbacks set status = #{status}, reply_content = #{replyContent}, replied_at = #{repliedAt}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
mapper.select: select r.id, r.reporter_id, u.nickname as reporter_nickname, r.target_type, r.target_id, r.reason_type, r.reason, r.media_ids_json, r.status, r.handler_id, r.handle_result, r.handled_at, r.created_at from cook_reports r inner join cook_users u on u.id = r.reporter_id and u.deleted_at is null where r.reporter_id = #{userId} and r.deleted_at is null order by r.created_at desc, r.id desc

select r.id, r.reporter_id, u.nickname as reporter_nickname, r.target_type, r.target_id, r.reason_type, r.reason, r.media_ids_json, r.status, r.handler_id, r.handle_result, r.handled_at, r.created_at from cook_reports r inner join cook_users u on u.id = r.reporter_id and u.deleted_at is null where r.id = #{id} and r.reporter_id = #{userId} and r.deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into cook_reports (reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason_type, reason, media_ids_json, status, handler_id, handle_result, handled_at) values (#{reporterId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reasonType}, #{reason}, #{mediaIdsJson}, #{status}, #{handlerId}, #{handleResult}, #{handledAt})
mapper.select: select r.id, r.reporter_id, u.nickname as reporter_nickname, r.target_type, r.target_id, r.reason_type, r.reason, r.media_ids_json, r.status, r.handler_id, r.handle_result, r.handled_at, r.created_at from cook_reports r inner join cook_users u on u.id = r.reporter_id and u.deleted_at is null where r.id = #{id} and r.deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.update: update cook_reports set status = #{status}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handle_result = #{handleResult}, handled_at = #{handledAt}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
mapper.select:
select id, owner_id, file_type, original_name, url, hls_url, status, size_bytes, metadata_json, created_at from cook_media_assets where deleted_at is null and status = 'ready'
and file_type = #{fileType}
and original_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by created_at desc, id desc

select id, owner_id, biz_type, file_type, original_name, url, hls_url, status, size_bytes, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from cook_media_assets where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null limit 1
select id, owner_id, file_type, original_name, url, hls_url, status, size_bytes, metadata_json, created_at from cook_media_assets where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into cook_media_assets (owner_id, biz_type, file_type, original_name, url, hls_url, status, size_bytes, metadata_json) values (#{ownerId}, #{bizType}, #{fileType}, #{originalName}, #{url}, #{hlsUrl}, #{status}, #{sizeBytes}, #{metadataJson})
mapper.update: update cook_media_assets set url = #{url}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_media_assets set url = #{url}, status = #{status}, size_bytes = #{sizeBytes}, metadata_json = #{metadataJson}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_media_assets set status = #{status}, metadata_json = #{metadataJson}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_media_assets set status = #{status}, hls_url = #{hlsUrl}, metadata_json = #{metadataJson}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_media_assets set status = #{status}, metadata_json = #{metadataJson}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
mapper.select: select session_id, owner_id, object_key, original_name, content_type, size_bytes, fingerprint, status, media_id, error_message, expires_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from cook_media_upload_sessions where owner_id = #{ownerId} and fingerprint = #{fingerprint} and size_bytes = #{sizeBytes} and status in ('pending', 'uploading', 'uploaded', 'transcoding') and expires_at > current_timestamp and deleted_at is null order by updated_at desc, created_at desc limit 1

select session_id, owner_id, object_key, original_name, content_type, size_bytes, fingerprint, status, media_id, error_message, expires_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from cook_media_upload_sessions where session_id = #{sessionId} and owner_id = #{ownerId} and deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.update: update cook_media_upload_sessions set status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = current_timestamp where session_id = #{sessionId} and owner_id = #{ownerId} and deleted_at is null

update cook_media_upload_sessions set status = #{status}, media_id = #{mediaId}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = current_timestamp where session_id = #{sessionId} and owner_id = #{ownerId} and deleted_at is null

update cook_media_upload_sessions set status = 'canceled', deleted_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where session_id = #{sessionId} and owner_id = #{ownerId} and deleted_at is null
